title: plananthus recurvus
intro: Plananthus recurvus, also known as the recurved plananthus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Planaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plananthus recurvus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Plananthus recurvus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and stems of the plant, and are often used to treat various ailments.
